title: Chapter 41
text: Connect with Lauren Check out LaurenBiel.com to sign up for the newsletter and get VIP (free and first) access to Lauren’s spicy novellas and other bonus content! Join the group on Facebook to connect with other fans and to discuss the books with the author. Visit http:// www. facebook. com/ groups/ laurenbieltraumances for more! Lauren is now on Patreon! Get access to even more content and sneak peeks at upcoming novels. Check it out at www. patreon. com/ LaurenBielAuthor to learn more!
